title: Tecticornia disarticulata
taxonomy: Tecticornia disarticulata is a species of plant that belongs to the family Amaranthaceae. The genus Tecticornia is part of the order Caryophyllales. This species is native to Australia and is often found in dry and sandy areas. The classification of Tecticornia disarticulata is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Angiospermophyta. Its classification into the family Amaranthaceae is due to its similarities in leaf structure and growth patterns with other members of the family.
